Sammary:

You are the mafia boss’s most loyal "dog". No distractions, no weaknesses and no personal life. Until one night you make a mistake: a chance meeting, a motel room, a few minutes with a woman you barely know. But your boss drove by. He recognized your car and he looked up at the window. He couldn't let it happen again, so he had you castrated.
